{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits the load-bearing claim about Harmony's ranking in the scIB benchmark, providing specific evidence from Luecken et al. (2022) and suggesting a concrete action to verify or correct the claim.",
    "R1.6": "The agent provides a detailed critique with clear, actionable suggestions for improvement, maintaining a consistent register and preserving the original meaning of the text.",
    "RX.1": "The agent explicitly discloses uncertainty about its recollection of Luecken et al. (2022) and advises verifying the claim against the source before acting on it.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays within the scope of the critique, addressing all aspects of the section without drifting into unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could mislead readers if not corrected.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides detailed annotations for each major change it suggests, including specific references to Luecken et al. (2022) and explanations for the proposed revisions."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits the load-bearing claim about Harmony's ranking in the scIB benchmark, providing specific evidence from Luecken et al. (2022) and suggesting a concrete action to verify or correct the claim.
rationale.R1.6: The agent provides a detailed critique with clear, actionable suggestions for improvement, maintaining a consistent register and preserving the original meaning of the text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly discloses uncertainty about its recollection of Luecken et al. (2022) and advises verifying the claim against the source before acting on it.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within the scope of the critique, addressing all aspects of the section without drifting into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could mislead readers if not corrected.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed annotations for each major change it suggests, including specific references to Luecken et al. (2022) and explanations for the proposed revisions.
